card_description: YHWH is a divine or mythological figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick outlines a radical "Nine-Stage" trajectory of the human soul's descent into and ascent out of the Black Iron Prison (BIP)."
